description: C1-C3 VLE based on Sage, Lacey & Schaafsma (1934) conditions
source: Sage, B.H., Lacey, W.N., & Schaafsma, J.G. (1934). Ind. Eng. Chem., 26(2), 214-217

mi_settings.notes: Expected values are PR-EOS computed (not raw experimental). Conditions from classic binary VLE study at 40F, 500 psia.

expected.notes: PR-EOS with zero BIPs. Literature experimental: nV~0.51, but EOS differs without tuning.
